message:
feat(twitter): add fcp.twitter connector manifest (flywheel_connectors-yff.1)

Add complete FCP2-compliant manifest for Twitter/X connector with:

Operations (13 total):
- Read: user_me, user_get, user_by_username, tweet_get, tweet_search,
  user_timeline, user_mentions
- Write: tweet_create, tweet_reply, tweet_delete
- Stream: stream_rules_list, stream_rules_add, stream_rules_delete

Features:
- Full network constraints for api.twitter.com and api.x.com
- Rate limit pools matching Twitter API v2 limits
- Proper risk/safety tiers for write vs read operations
- AI hints with usage guidance and common mistakes
- OAuth 1.0a authentication support (stateless model)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,1019 @@
+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:0f208aeb028894635329b8efae92a551fe4450f8fa59f519f16059348d9b7421"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.twitter"
+name = "Twitter/X Connector"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "FCP connector for Twitter/X API with REST operations and filtered stream support"
+archetypes = [
+    "operational",
+    "streaming",
+    "bidirectional",
+]
+format = "native"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "stateless"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "init"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = [
+    "z:owner",
+    "z:private",
+    "z:work",
+]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+forbidden = ["z:public"]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = [
+    "network.dns",
+    "network.egress",
+    "network.tls.sni",
+]
+optional = []
+forbidden = [
+    "system.exec",
+    "network.listen",
+    "storage.state",
+]
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_add]
+description = "Add filter rules to the tweet stream"
+capability = "twitter.stream"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_add.rate_limit]
+max = 450
+per_ms = 900000
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_add.input_schema]
+required = ["rules"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_add.input_schema.properties.rules]
+description = "Array of filter rules to add"
+maxItems = 25
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_add.input_schema.properties.rules.items]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_add.input_schema.properties.rules.items.properties.tag]
+description = "Optional label for the rule"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_add.input_schema.properties.rules.items.properties.value]
+description = "Filter rule (Twitter filter syntax)"
+maxLength = 512
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_add.output_schema]
+required = []
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_add.output_schema.properties.errors]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_add.output_schema.properties.meta]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_add.output_schema.properties.rules]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_add.network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "api.twitter.com",
+    "api.x.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_add.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Add rules to filter the real-time tweet stream."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Invalid filter syntax.",
+    "Exceeding rule limits (25 rules, 512 chars each).",
+]
+examples = ['{"rules": [{"value": "from:TwitterDev", "tag": "dev_tweets"}]}']
+related = [
+    "twitter.stream_rules_list",
+    "twitter.stream_rules_delete",
+]
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_delete]
+description = "Delete filter rules from the tweet stream"
+capability = "twitter.stream"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_delete.rate_limit]
+max = 450
+per_ms = 900000
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_delete.input_schema]
+required = ["ids"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_delete.input_schema.properties.ids]
+description = "Array of rule IDs to delete"
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_delete.input_schema.properties.ids.items]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_delete.output_schema]
+required = []
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_delete.output_schema.properties.errors]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_delete.output_schema.properties.meta]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_delete.network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "api.twitter.com",
+    "api.x.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_delete.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Remove filter rules from the tweet stream."
+common_mistakes = ["Using rule value instead of rule ID."]
+examples = ['{"ids": ["1234567890"]}']
+related = [
+    "twitter.stream_rules_list",
+    "twitter.stream_rules_add",
+]
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_list]
+description = "List active filtered stream rules"
+capability = "twitter.stream"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_list.rate_limit]
+max = 450
+per_ms = 900000
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_list.input_schema]
+required = []
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_list.output_schema]
+required = []
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_list.output_schema.properties.rules]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_list.output_schema.properties.rules.items]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_list.output_schema.properties.rules.items.properties.id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_list.output_schema.properties.rules.items.properties.tag]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_list.output_schema.properties.rules.items.properties.value]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_list.network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "api.twitter.com",
+    "api.x.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations.stream_rules_list.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "View current filter rules for the tweet stream."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ["{}"]
+related = [
+    "twitter.stream_rules_add",
+    "twitter.stream_rules_delete",
+]
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_create]
+description = "Post a new tweet (max 280 characters)"
+capability = "twitter.write"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_create.rate_limit]
+max = 200
+per_ms = 86400000
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_create.input_schema]
+required = ["text"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_create.input_schema.properties.text]
+description = "Tweet text content (max 280 characters)"
+maxLength = 280
+minLength = 1
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_create.output_schema]
+required = ["tweet"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_create.output_schema.properties.tweet]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_create.output_schema.properties.tweet.properties.id]
+description = "Created tweet ID"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_create.output_schema.properties.tweet.properties.text]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_create.network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "api.twitter.com",
+    "api.x.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_create.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Post a new public tweet. This is visible to all followers."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Exceeding 280 character limit.",
+    "Not considering the public nature of tweets.",

+
+[provides.operations.tweet_delete]
+description = "Delete a tweet (irreversible)"

+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"

+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_delete.rate_limit]

+per_ms = 900000
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_delete.input_schema]

+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_delete.input_schema.properties.tweet_id]

+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_delete.output_schema]

+
+[provides.operations.tweet_delete.output_schema.properties.deleted]
+description = "Whether the tweet was deleted"
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_delete.network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "api.twitter.com",
+    "api.x.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_delete.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Permanently delete a tweet. This cannot be undone."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Deleting wrong tweet - always verify the tweet_id.",
+    "Can only delete your own tweets.",
+]
+examples = ['{"tweet_id": "1234567890123456789"}']
+related = ["twitter.tweet_get"]
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_get]
+description = "Get a single tweet by its ID"
+capability = "twitter.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_get.rate_limit]
+max = 300
+per_ms = 900000
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_get.input_schema]
+required = ["tweet_id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_get.input_schema.properties.tweet_id]
+description = "Tweet ID (numeric string)"
+pattern = "^[0-9]+$"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_get.output_schema]
+required = ["tweet"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_get.output_schema.properties.tweet]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_get.output_schema.properties.tweet.properties.author_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_get.output_schema.properties.tweet.properties.id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_get.output_schema.properties.tweet.properties.text]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_get.network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "api.twitter.com",
+    "api.x.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_get.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Retrieve a specific tweet by its ID."

+examples = ['{"tweet_id": "1234567890123456789"}']
+related = [
+    "twitter.tweet_search",
+    "twitter.user_timeline",
+]
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_reply]
+description = "Reply to an existing tweet"
+capability = "twitter.write"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_reply.rate_limit]

+
+[provides.operations.tweet_reply.input_schema]

+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000

+
+[provides.operations.tweet_reply.ai_hints]

+common_mistakes = [
+    "Using tweet URL instead of numeric tweet ID.",

+]
+examples = ['{"text": "Great point!", "reply_to": "1234567890123456789"}']
+related = [
+    "twitter.tweet_create",
+    "twitter.tweet_get",

+[provides.operations.tweet_search]
+description = "Search recent tweets (last 7 days) matching a query"
+capability = "twitter.read"

+safety_tier = "safe"

+[provides.operations.tweet_search.rate_limit]

+[provides.operations.tweet_search.input_schema]

+[provides.operations.tweet_search.input_schema.properties.since_id]

+
+[provides.operations.tweet_search.input_schema.properties.sort_order]

+
+[provides.operations.tweet_search.output_schema]
+required = []
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_search.output_schema.properties.meta]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_search.output_schema.properties.meta.properties.next_token]

+
+[provides.operations.tweet_search.output_schema.properties.meta.properties.result_count]

+
+[provides.operations.tweet_search.output_schema.properties.tweets]

+[provides.operations.tweet_search.output_schema.properties.tweets.items]

+[provides.operations.tweet_search.network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "api.twitter.com",

+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 60000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations.tweet_search.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Search for recent tweets. Only returns tweets from the last 7 days."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Expecting historical tweets beyond 7 days.",
+    "Not handling pagination for large result sets.",
+]
+examples = [
+    '{"query": "from:TwitterDev"}',
+    '{"query": "#rust lang:en", "max_results": 25}',
+]
+related = [
+    "twitter.user_timeline",
+    "twitter.tweet_get",
+]

+[provides.operations.user_by_username]
+description = "Get a user's profile by their username (handle)"

+risk_level = "low"

+related = [
+    "twitter.user_by_username",
+    "twitter.user_me",
+]
+
+[provides.operations.user_me]
+description = "Get the authenticated user's profile information"
+capability = "twitter.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.user_me.rate_limit]
+max = 75
+per_ms = 900000
+
+[provides.operations.user_me.input_schema]
+required = []
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.user_me.output_schema]
+required = ["user"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.user_me.output_schema.properties.user]
+description = "Authenticated user object"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.user_me.output_schema.properties.user.properties.id]
+description = "User ID"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.user_me.output_schema.properties.user.properties.name]
+description = "Display name"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.user_me.output_schema.properties.user.properties.username]
+description = "Twitter handle (without @)"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.user_me.network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "api.twitter.com",
+    "api.x.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations.user_me.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Get information about the currently authenticated user."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ["{}"]
+related = [
+    "twitter.user_get",
+    "twitter.user_by_username",
+]
+
+[provides.operations.user_mentions]
+description = "Get tweets mentioning a user"
+capability = "twitter.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.user_mentions.rate_limit]
+max = 180
+per_ms = 900000
+
+[provides.operations.user_mentions.input_schema]
+required = []
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.user_mentions.input_schema.properties.max_results]
+default = 10
+description = "Maximum mentions to return (5-100)"
+maximum = 100
+minimum = 5
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations.user_mentions.input_schema.properties.pagination_token]
+description = "Pagination token for next page"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.user_mentions.input_schema.properties.user_id]
+description = "Twitter user ID (defaults to authenticated user)"
+pattern = "^[0-9]+$"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.user_mentions.output_schema]
+required = []
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.user_mentions.output_schema.properties.meta]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.user_mentions.output_schema.properties.tweets]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations.user_mentions.output_schema.properties.tweets.items]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.user_mentions.network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "api.twitter.com",
+    "api.x.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations.user_mentions.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Get tweets that mention a user. Defaults to the authenticated user if no user_id provided."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = [
+    "{}",
+    '{"user_id": "12345678901234567", "max_results": 25}',
+]
+related = [
+    "twitter.user_timeline",
+    "twitter.tweet_search",
+]
+
+[provides.operations.user_timeline]
+description = "Get a user's recent tweets"
+capability = "twitter.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.user_timeline.rate_limit]
+max = 1500
+per_ms = 900000
+
+[provides.operations.user_timeline.input_schema]
+required = ["user_id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.user_timeline.input_schema.properties.max_results]
+default = 10
+description = "Maximum tweets to return (5-100)"
+maximum = 100
+minimum = 5
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations.user_timeline.input_schema.properties.pagination_token]
+description = "Pagination token for next page"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.user_timeline.input_schema.properties.user_id]
+description = "Twitter user ID"
+pattern = "^[0-9]+$"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.user_timeline.output_schema]
+required = []
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.user_timeline.output_schema.properties.meta]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.user_timeline.output_schema.properties.tweets]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations.user_timeline.output_schema.properties.tweets.items]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.user_timeline.network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "api.twitter.com",
+    "api.x.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations.user_timeline.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Get a user's recent tweets. Use user_by_username first to get the user_id."
+common_mistakes = ["Passing username instead of numeric user_id."]
+examples = ['{"user_id": "12345678901234567", "max_results": 20}']
+related = [
+    "twitter.user_by_username",
+    "twitter.user_mentions",
+]
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 256
+cpu_percent = 50
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 120000
+fs_readonly_paths = [
+    "/usr",
+    "/lib",
+]
+fs_writable_paths = []
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "twitter.read"
+requests = 300
+window_ms = 900000
+burst = 50
+scope = "instance"
+
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "twitter.write"
+requests = 200
+window_ms = 86400000
+burst = 10
+scope = "instance"
+
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "twitter.delete"
+requests = 50
+window_ms = 900000
+burst = 5
+scope = "instance"
+
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "twitter.stream"
+requests = 450
+window_ms = 900000
+burst = 50
+scope = "instance"
+
+[rate_limits.operation_pools]
+tweet_get = ["twitter.read"]
+stream_rules_add = ["twitter.stream"]
+stream_rules_delete = ["twitter.stream"]
+user_timeline = ["twitter.read"]
+tweet_reply = ["twitter.write"]
+tweet_create = ["twitter.write"]
+user_me = ["twitter.read"]
+tweet_delete = ["twitter.delete"]
+stream_rules_list = ["twitter.stream"]
+user_mentions = ["twitter.read"]
+tweet_search = ["twitter.read"]
+user_by_username = ["twitter.read"]
+user_get = ["twitter.read"]
